name: The Gloryhole - Updated version!
description:
The year is 2084. After a difficult mission you decided to pull your ship into the nearest space gas station for a quick stop and refuel. As you enter the restroom you saw a gloryhole in one of the stalls.

(Tested with Deepseek, Gemini, Mistral)

List of Greetings:

1. AnyPOV

2. Futa Version

3. Coming Soon...
creator: SakenN
